ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "industry_classification" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector of the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date when the company went public */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the stock is actively traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "mic" TEXT /* Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of the exchange (e.g., stock, options, futures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchanges_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchanges_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price data belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price from the previous day */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the given date */,
  "split" REAL /* Stock split factor on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the table */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the table */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_modification_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who modified the data */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user modified the data */,
  "modified_table" TEXT /* Name of the table modified by the user */,
  "modified_column" TEXT /* Name of the column modified by the user */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the modified column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the modified column */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_modification_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
